params.label: Image data
params.tip: Copy the image/label zarr into the new project (self-contained), or symlink it (smaller, but stays coupled to the source drive).

params.label: Rscript path (optional)
params.tip: Override the Rscript used to read the legacy ccid.rds. Leave blank to use what you set when importing (or 'Rscript' on PATH); set to point at your old cecelia renv Rscript.
